what_it_does: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment record that declares a channel attachment of type board_items and links it to a specific board item target.
observations: Contains only metadata frontmatter with no body content
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-5f3284ed
standouts: The attachment_type board_items indicates a board-item linkage
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a triple-dash delimiter
Uses a prefixed id matching the filename
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset
Stores channel memory attachments in a flat file per attachment
concerns: No descriptive title, body, or context for the attachment
Target board item is opaque without additional data
notes: A bare channel-attachment metadata stub that points an attachment to a board item in dragnet-development.
questions: What content or artifact does this attachment represent?
What is board://item-5f3284ed and what does it describe?
Who added this attachment and why?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is a board_items attachment linking to a board item, which matches the actual content.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to record that a particular attachment is associated with a specific board item in a development channel, preserving the relationship and time of addition.
contribution: Preserves a timestamped link between an attachment identifier and a board item identifier within a channel memory ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata record of type board_items linking attachment att-1f352b11 to board item item-5f3284ed in the dragnet-development channel.
intention_for_embedding: To record that an attachment was associated with a specific board item in a development channel at a known time.
